mapper.select: SELECT * FROM chat_records WHERE deleted = 0 AND ( (sender_id = #{userId1} AND receiver_id = #{userId2}) OR (sender_id = #{userId2} AND receiver_id = #{userId1}) ) ORDER BY sent_at ASC

SELECT CASE WHEN sender_id = #{userId} THEN receiver_id ELSE sender_id END AS partner_id, MAX(sent_at) as last_message_time FROM chat_records WHERE deleted = 0 AND (sender_id = #{userId} OR receiver_id = #{userId}) GROUP BY partner_id ORDER BY last_message_time DESC
SELECT MAX(sent_at) as last_message_time FROM chat_records WHERE deleted = 0 AND ( (sender_id = #{userId1} AND receiver_id = #{userId2}) OR (sender_id = #{userId2} AND receiver_id = #{userId1}) )
